# Issue Templates

## Purpose

This folder stores GitHub issue forms for collecting useful reports from users and reviewers.

## What Is Here

- Templates that guide people to include symptoms, platform details, and reproduction steps.
- Markdown or YAML files used only by GitHub's issue UI.

## When To Edit This

- Update this folder when the project needs better bug reports or presentation feedback.
- Keep forms short so non-technical users can still submit issues.

## Related Folders

- `.github/workflows/` validates code after issues become fixes.
